plugins.name: JS Handler
plugins.description: A CLIProxyAPI plugin that executes external JavaScript scripts to intercept and modify requests, responses, and streaming chunks using the Goja VM engine.
plugins.author: easyatm

plugins.name: Codex Invite
plugins.description: Sends Codex referral invite emails from CPA using a selected Codex OAuth credential.
plugins.author: Supra4E8C

plugins.name: CPA Usage Keeper
plugins.description: Adds a CPAMC entry for opening CPA Usage Keeper from the management center. Requires CPA Usage Keeper v1.12.2 or later.
plugins.author: Willxup

plugins.name: Privacy Filter
plugins.description: Intercepts model requests and redacts emails, phone numbers, API keys, tokens, and other secrets before they reach upstream providers, using embedded Gitleaks rules.
plugins.author: rheodev

plugins.name: Antigravity Coding Filter
plugins.description: Intercept requests from mainstream programming software, especially reverse-engineering-related requests from Google Antigravity, to prevent account bans.
plugins.author: jellyfish-p

plugins.name: Gemini CLI
plugins.description: A plugin that adds Gemini CLI upstream provider support to CLIProxyAPI through the native plugin ABI.
plugins.author: Luis Pater

plugins.name: Priority Auto Router
plugins.description: Routes Claude Code and Codex CLI model alias requests through prioritized CPA provider candidates with automatic fallback.
plugins.author: Amin

plugins.name: Codex 429 Auto Ban
plugins.description: Auto-disables Codex credentials on 429 and auto re-enables them after the exhausted rate-limit window (5-hour or weekly) refreshes, using upstream x-codex-* response headers.
plugins.author: ysxk

plugins.name: Model Fallback Router
plugins.description: Retries matching model requests through configured fallback model names when the primary model fails with quota, rate-limit, transport, or configured HTTP status errors.
plugins.author: thebtf

plugins.name: CPA Key Policy
plugins.description: Manages plugin-owned downstream API keys with per-key model alias lists routed to CPA provider models, per-key RPM, daily/weekly USD usage limits with cache-aware billing (cache spend + hit-rate reporting), and management APIs. Includes an embedded multilingual (zh-CN/zh-TW/en/ru) Key Policy UI served as a CPA plugin resource, following the panel's language. Acts as a non-exclusive frontend auth provider (native api-keys may still be used).
plugins.author: origin652

plugins.name: Embeddings Rerank Forward
plugins.description: Forwards OpenAI-compatible embeddings and Cohere-style rerank requests to upstream providers. Supports multiple providers per route with model aliasing and key failover.
plugins.author: KorenKrita
